# Photographer Gallery Project

## Project Overview
Fast photographer gallery built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, PhotoSwipe, and Framer Motion. Optimized for Cloudflare Pages deployment.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14 (App Router)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- PhotoSwipe (lightbox)
- Framer Motion (animations)
- Cloudflare Pages (hosting)

## CDN
Images served from: https://cdn.xperia.pt/
